app.name: [hi] Plate-Clean
app.footer: [hi] Finishing a meal isn't a moral test — it's a small win for the planet.

landing.headline: [hi] Finish your plate, unlock a reward.
landing.description: [hi] Snap a photo when you sit down, and another before you ask for the bill. A server reviews it. If you cleared most of what you ordered, the kitchen sends a small treat your way.
landing.tagline_disclaimer: [hi] Less food into the bin means less methane out of it. That's the only scoreboard we keep.

login.age_confirm: [hi] I confirm I am 18 or older.
login.switch_to_sign_in: [hi] Already have an account? Sign in

scan.title: [hi] Start a meal
scan.blurb: [hi] In production this screen scans a QR sticker on your table. For the pilot, pick a restaurant and type your table code.

order.title: [hi] Place your order
order.blurb: [hi] Pick what you ordered. Default portion is small — pick more only if you're sure you'll eat it.

capture.before_blurb: [hi] Hold the camera over your plates. Try to fit everything you ordered in the frame.
capture.after_blurb: [hi] Snap your plates the way they are right now. A server will review the picture next.
capture.missing_nonce: [hi] Missing capture token. Re-open the session from the kitchen flow.

session_status.title: [hi] Your meal
session_status.between_meals_hint: [hi] Enjoy your meal. When you're ready to pay, come back here.
session_status.review_heading: [hi] Your server is reviewing — usually under a minute.
session_status.review_blurb: [hi] A staff member checks the photo against your table before any reward is issued. We'll update this screen the moment they decide.
session_status.approved_heading: [hi] Approved — thanks for finishing what you ordered.
session_status.approved_blurb: [hi] Your score was just below the threshold this time, so no reward today. Try a smaller portion next visit to land it.
session_status.rejected_blurb: [hi] The server didn't see enough food finished to qualify. If you think this is wrong, you can raise a dispute — an owner will look at it within 48 hours.

choose_reward.heading: [hi] Pick how you'd like your reward.
choose_reward.value_blurb: [hi] Value: {{amount}}. Same either way. You have 30 days — full value for the first 15, half value after.

type.menu_item_blurb: [hi] Hand the code to your server. The kitchen sends out the dish.
type.bill_discount_blurb: [hi] Same value, applied as a discount the next time you eat at this restaurant. Good for 30 days.

rewards.title: [hi] Your rewards
rewards.empty: [hi] Nothing here yet. Finish your next meal and one will show up.

profile.title: [hi] Profile
profile.delete_confirm: [hi] Delete your account and all associated data? This cannot be undone.
profile.delete_blurb: [hi] Deletion happens within 7 days. Photos from your sessions are removed too.
profile.retention_blurb: [hi] How long should we keep the before / after photos from your meals? The default is one week. Opt in to 90 days to help us improve the model with your plates — you can change this any time.
profile.retention_7_caption: [hi] Photos are removed after one week.
profile.retention_90_caption: [hi] Helps train the model on real plates.
